items.title: June 16, 2005: Detroit's Lindsey Hunter finishes with 17 PTS (7-10 FG)/5 AST off the bench during a 102-71 win over San Antonio in Game 4 of the NBA Finals.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
June 16, 2005: Detroit's Lindsey Hunter finishes with 17 PTS (7-10 FG)/5 AST off the bench during a 102-71 win over San Antonio in Game 4 of the NBA Finals.

Chauncey Billups had 17 PTS/7 AST for the Pistons, who tied the series at 2-2. The Spurs' Tim Duncan had 16 PTS/16 REB.
